nutritional_guidelines: Emphasize a Mediterranean-leaning diet. Incorporate high-fiber, cruciferous vegetables. Strictly limit alcohol intake.
exercise_protocol: Progressive resistance training (2-3x/week) prioritizing upper-body mobility and lymphedema prevention exercises.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Breast Cancer v1.2026 / ASCO Endocrine Therapy Updates.

recommended_drugs: Sacituzumab Govitecan (Trodelvy), Capivasertib + Fulvestrant, Elacestrant (ESR1 mutant).
nutritional_guidelines: High-calorie and protein-dense nutrition via shakes to mitigate advanced cachexia, severe nausea, and mucosal sores.
exercise_protocol: Low-to-moderate intensity aerobic walking combined with light resistance bands to combat chronic cancer-related fatigue.
scientific_source: FDA Oncology Center Approval Registry (Sacituzumab Govitecan Context) 2024-2026.

nutritional_guidelines: Incorporate omega-3 fatty acids, minimize processed red meat intake, and optimize systemic fiber absorption.
exercise_protocol: Moderate-intensity structured resistance training combined with core exercises to support pelvic floor stability.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Colon and Rectal Cancer v2.2026 / ESMO Consensus.

recommended_drugs: FOLFIRI (Irinotecan + 5-FU) + Bevacizumab, or Pembrolizumab if MSI-High.
nutritional_guidelines: Hydration protocols to counter severe diarrhea induced by Irinotecan. Supplement water and electrolytes actively.
exercise_protocol: Functional task adaptation exercises focused on energy conservation and core core-stability training.
scientific_source: NCCN Colon Cancer Second-Line Treatment Pathways / ASCO Precision Medicine.

nutritional_guidelines: Small, frequent, nutrient-dense meals to manage potential targeted therapy-induced stomatitis and diarrhea.
exercise_protocol: Low-impact resistance training paired with targeted diaphragmatic breathing and light aerobic pacing to improve lung capacity.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) v3.2026 (EGFR Targets).

recommended_drugs: Amivantamab-vmjw, or Docetaxel + Ramucirumab, Pemetrexed Salvage.
nutritional_guidelines: Implement soft foods and cold liquids to soothe esophageal mucosal lining irritated by salvage chemotherapy cycles.
exercise_protocol: Supervised light resistance stretching and lifestyle energy conservation techniques to maintain basic independence.
scientific_source: FDA Oncology Approval Databases / ESMO NSCLC Salvage Therapy Guidelines.

recommended_drugs: Cisplatin or Carboplatin + Paclitaxel + Radiation Therapy.
nutritional_guidelines: Incorporate calorie-dense smoothies and pureed diets to overcome radiation-induced dysphagia (difficulty swallowing).
exercise_protocol: Incorporate shoulder posture tracking and targeted stretching to preserve chest wall compliance post-radiation.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Lung Cancer Staging / Thoracic Radiation Protocols.

nutritional_guidelines: Monitor and counter profound weight loss with structured branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) and proteins.
exercise_protocol: Low-intensity functional physical therapy focused on ambulatory maintenance and pulmonary comfort.
scientific_source: ASCO Systemic Therapy for Stage IV Squamous Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer.

nutritional_guidelines: Increase calcium and Vitamin D supplementation to actively protect bone mineral density during hormone blockades.
exercise_protocol: High-load axial resistance training (squats, overhead presses) to stimulate bone remodeling and combat osteopenia.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Prostate Cancer v2.2026 / AUA Guidelines.

nutritional_guidelines: Monitor glucose levels closely to mitigate metabolic syndrome risks associated with chronic therapeutic androgen suppression.
exercise_protocol: Supervised, low-impact functional strength and balance mechanics to minimize falling risks associated with skeletal events.
scientific_source: ASCO Advanced/Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer Updates.

nutritional_guidelines: Antioxidant-rich foods, low-sodium dietary balancing, and absolute hydration tracking.
exercise_protocol: Moderate aerobic training mixed with large-muscle group resistance exercises, adjusting for peripheral neuropathy.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Cutaneous Melanoma v2.2026 / Adjuvant Approvals.

prior_treatment_status: Prior Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor Anti-PD1 Failure
recommended_drugs: Nivolumab + Ipilimumab combination, or Dabrafenib + Trametinib (BRAF V600E+).
nutritional_guidelines: Probiotics via natural foods (kefir, plain yogurt) to build gut microbiome diversity for active immunotherapy response.
exercise_protocol: Structured neuromuscular training and balance exercises to reduce fall risks caused by advanced immunotherapy toxicities.
scientific_source: FDA Center for Drug Evaluation Precision Registries / ASCO Melanoma Framework.

nutritional_guidelines: Prescribe soft-textured or liquid diets to manage severe mucositis and xerostomia (dry mouth) caused by radiotherapy.
exercise_protocol: Progressive neck and jaw range-of-motion exercises to prevent trismus (lockjaw) and fibrosis post-radiation.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Head and Neck Cancers v1.2026.

recommended_drugs: Olaparib (PARP Inhibitor maintenance for BRCA+) or Niraparib.
nutritional_guidelines: Small, carbohydrate-balanced frequent meals to handle persistent gastrointestinal bloating and early satiety.
exercise_protocol: Low-impact pelvic floor strengthening combined with progressive bodyweight resistance training.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Ovarian Cancer Including Fallopian Tube Cancers v2.2026.

nutritional_guidelines: Follow an anti-inflammatory diet plan, monitoring micronutrient levels due to chronic systemic drug exposure.
exercise_protocol: Moderate intensity general resistance training combined with low-impact steady-state cardiovascular walking.
scientific_source: FDA Approvals for dMMR/MSI-H Solid Tumors / NCCN Uterine Carcinoma.

nutritional_guidelines: Strict neutropenic precautions: avoid unpasteurized foods, raw seafood, or unwashed fruits during high myelosuppression.
exercise_protocol: Supervised light cycling or aquatic therapy to protect bone structure from high-toxicity chemotherapy cycles.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Bladder/Urothelial Carcinoma v1.2026.

nutritional_guidelines: Support renal health by maintaining a steady daily fluid intake and avoiding excessive synthetic sodium additives.
exercise_protocol: Moderate-intensity progressive full-body resistance training to maintain lean muscle tissue and combat fatigue.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Kidney / Renal Cell Carcinoma v2.2026.

recommended_drugs: Nivolumab + FoI FOX or Ramucirumab + Paclitaxel second-line.
nutritional_guidelines: Incorporate highly digestible, low-volume, fractionated meals to combat dumping syndrome and post-gastrectomy complications.
exercise_protocol: Postural corrective stretching combined with low-impact cardiovascular training to support abdominal compliance.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Gastric and Esophageal Cancers v1.2026.

recommended_drugs: Modified FOLFIRINOX (Fluorouracil, Leucovorin, Irinotecan, Oxaliplatin) or Gemcitabine + Nab-Paclitaxel.
nutritional_guidelines: Enzyme replacement therapy (Creon) to counter pancreatic exocrine insufficiency and prevent chronic malabsorption.
exercise_protocol: Functional ambulatory pacing combined with targeted lower-limb strength training to sustain general mobility.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma v2.2026 / ESMO Framework.

nutritional_guidelines: Monitor sodium and total fluid retention strictly to counter edema secondary to liver portal pressure changes.
exercise_protocol: Light, energy-conservative seated exercises and core physical therapy to avoid dangerous inner-abdominal pressure shifts.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Hepatocellular Carcinoma v1.2026 / AASLD Standards.

recommended_drugs: Temozolomide (TMZ) concurrent with RT, Tumor Treating Fields (TTFields), Bevacizumab.
nutritional_guidelines: Ketogenic-leaning, low-glycemic index foods to actively manage dexamethasone-induced systemic hyperglycemia.
exercise_protocol: Neuro-motor functional exercise focusing on balance, gait mechanics, and fall prevention under close supervision.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Central Nervous System Cancers v1.2026.
